channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: IBM closes Hashicorp buy, looks to boost enterprise multicloud and AI automation technology
item.description: In announcing the closure of its $6.4 billion buy of Hashicorp, IBM said its goal is to infuse HashiCorp automation and security technology in every data center possible.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Wait, what? The Lenovo Legion Go 2's first performance impressions are supposedly already here - it doesn't look like a major improvement over its predecessor
item.description: The Lenovo Legion Go 2 is still a prototype, but we may have an early insight into its performance capabilities if this YouTube video is legitimate.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NFL Combine IQ Tool Released to Public, Making Data More Comprehensible | AP News
item.description: NFL's NextGen Stats team partners with Amazon QuickSight to release Combine IQ tool, providing fans and analysts a more comprehensible form of combine data.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: FBI says North Korean Lazarus hackers were behind $1.5 billion Bybit crypto hack
item.description: The FBI has accused the North Korean Lazarus Group of being behind the largest cryptocurrency theft in history.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips that power artificial intelligence systems continued to grow.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Venus Williams backs the walking app WeWard
item.description: WeWard, an app that offers real-world rewards for walking, announced Wednesday it’s signed tennis champ Venus Williams as an investor and ambassador for the app.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: At 10, USB-C still hasn’t lived up to its full potential
item.description: Slightly under 10 years ago, when I reviewed a new Apple MacBook, I devoted a surprising percentage of my wordage to its port. Yes, port—it had only one.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Five takeaways from Cisco Live EMEA
item.description: Cisco held its European user event in Amsterdam this month, presenting a good mix of industry trends, product innovation, and vision from Cisco as to where they see the market going.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Consumers are connected more than ever before
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Sowmyanarayan Sampath, Fast Company

item.title: New European AI weather model to improve forecasts
item.description: The European Center for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) has made its new AI model, the Artificial Intelligence Forecasting System (AIFS), available to everyone free of charge. Medium-range weather forecasts are those that predict weather conditions for three to 15 days into the future.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Connolly Calls on OPM to Reverse CIO Classification Change
item.description: Rep. Gerry Connolly questions the Trump administration's decision to reclassify Chief Information Officer positions, citing concerns about politicization and potential impact on federal IT modernization projects.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: New Relic boosts observability platform with AI intelligence
item.description: New Relic announced updates to its Intelligent Observability Platform this week, which the company says will enable a unified view of system relationships and dependencies and intelligently connect technical systems with business context.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Review: Gemini Code Assist is good at coding
item.description: Given that Microsoft/GitHub/Azure and Amazon/AWS offer AI coding assistants, namely GitHub Copilot and Amazon Q Developer, which work as add-ins to Visual Studio Code and other IDEs, it was inevitable that Google/GCP would introduce one of its own.
item.dc:creator: Info World
